title: Probably MAOA 4 or 5 repeats: not Warrior Gene
summary: Probably MAOA 4 or 5 repeats: not Warrior Gene.
detail: People with this SNP usually also have either the 4 or 5 repeat (non-Warrior) version of MAOA which makes them less aggressive and less anti-social. If you are male, you inherited this from your mother. Do not confuse this with the completely different warrior/worrier gene.
whyItMatters: SNPedia has a genotype-specific page for this result, which can add consumer-facing context alongside primary evidence sources.

title: Probably one Warrior Gene and one non-Warrior Gene
summary: Probably one Warrior Gene and one non-Warrior Gene.
detail: Women with this combination usually have the 3 repeat MAOA Warrior Gene on one X chromosome and the 4 or 5 repeat MAOA non-Warrior Gene on the other X chromosome. The 3 repeat Warrior Gene makes people more aggressive and antisocial. If you are a man, there was a problem reading this SNP (or you are XXY).
whyItMatters: SNPedia has a genotype-specific page for this result, which can add consumer-facing context alongside primary evidence sources.
conditions: Probably one Warrior Gene and one non-Warrior Gene.

Women with this combination usually have the 3 repeat MAOA Warrior Gene on one X chromosome and the 4 or 5 repeat MAOA non-Warrior Gene on the other X chromosome. The 3 repeat Warrior Gene makes people more aggressive and antisocial. If you are a man, there was a problem reading this SNP (or you are XXY).

title: Perhaps MAOA 3 repeats: Warrior Gene?
summary: Perhaps MAOA 3 repeats: Warrior Gene?
detail: People with this SNP may also have the 3 repeat version of MAOA, known as the Warrior Gene. It makes people more aggressive and antisocial. If you are male, you inherited this from your mother and your sons won't get it from you. Do not confuse this with the completely different warrior/worrier COMT gene.
